name: Drunken Ramblings
author: BBBence1111
bootlegger: Players do not learn what token they got from the bag.
Minion and Demon info are not given, no other role confirming events (eg. Demon learning the Excorcist) happen.
The Yaggababble doesn't learn their phrase, but it is something they've publicly said on their first day at least once.
Players whose alignment changes learn this, but not what their new alignment is.
The Golem and Hermit may ignore the nomination restriction.
